title: Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron sued for alleged collusion to inflate RAM prices
summary: A class-action lawsuit in the United States accuses the three largest DRAM memory manufacturers of forming an oligopoly and manipulating the market to fix anticompetitive prices.

title: Valve cancels Steam Machine Companion Cube case due to lack of license, and pre-order resales skyrocket in price
summary: Dbrand admits its mistake in not asking Valve for permission for the accessory, while Valve's handheld console is already being resold on eBay with heavy markups.

title: GTA 6 breaks pre-order records on Xbox, confirmed to have no physical edition, and platform war intensifies
summary: Microsoft boasts order numbers, a new report indicates the absence of a disc at launch, and the community debates about the wait on PC.

title: Netflix releases first trailer for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2, arriving this fall with an even more violent story
summary: The second season of CD Projekt Red's anime promises a return to Night City with new characters and a more brutal tone than the first season.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls confirms Blade, Loki, and Deadpool as new playable characters
summary: Marvel's fighting game announces its open beta for PS5 and PC, boasting high-quality references and animations.

title: Sony warns it will not take 'significant' losses on PS6 price, which could exceed $900
summary: Sony Interactive Entertainment's CEO justifies the stance due to the high cost of components, while speculating that Nintendo Switch 2 will be its direct competitor in the handheld sector.

title: Nintendo announces a special Direct for Splatoon Raiders on June 30
summary: The event will feature a live Nintendo Treehouse and will show new mechanics and game modes for the anticipated title.

title: CD Projekt merges and now operates only under the name CD Projekt Red
summary: The parent company adopts its development studio's brand to simplify its identity, although the change has caused some confusion among fans.

title: Tekken 8 confirms Bob for August and shows trailer for Roger Jr. with a famous reference to Tekken 7
summary: Bandai Namco details the release schedule for Season 3's new DLC characters, including early access dates.

title: Xbox pauses new third-party agreements for Game Pass as unionized workers respond to layoffs
summary: Rumors of cuts to the subscription service and statements from a veteran of the industry generate uncertainty about the future of Xbox's catalog.

title: Dead or Alive 6 replaced by a version with 440 DLC that forces players to pay again for already purchased content
summary: The controversial re-release receives massive criticism on Steam for considering it 'insulting' to ask for more money for content that users already owned.

title: Sega reveals mysterious Bakunawa Killer in a new Virtua Fighter Crossroads trailer
summary: The battle against this enigmatic character is shaping up to be one of the game's greatest challenges, sparking all kinds of theories among fans.

title: PlayStation persists with games-as-a-service and plans to 'revitalize' the genre
summary: Despite having canceled most of its live service projects, Sony Interactive Entertainment reaffirms its commitment to the sector.

title: Controversy in Pokémon TCG: Target artificially raises prices, DeNA receives controversial subsidies, and an unattainable card
summary: The community criticizes price increases in stores, multi-million dollar aid to the studio, and the scarcity of one of the most sought-after cards of 2026.

title: Activision promotes Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4, reminding players it 'won't be on Game Pass'
summary: The advertising campaign for the new installment of the saga highlights its absence from Microsoft's subscription service at launch.

title: Riot Games adds Lux and Samira to the 2XKO fighter roster
summary: The free-to-play fighting game from League of Legends expands its roster ahead of its full launch in 2026.

title: Sony again removes purchased content from user libraries due to 'license agreements'
summary: Players report losing access to games they purchased after years without logging in, while Sony removes Studio Canal films.

title: Ubisoft faces two fronts: strike by Rainbow Six Siege developers and death of co-founder
summary: While Ubisoft Barcelona workers protest layoffs and return-to-office, the company mourns one of its key figures.

title: Planescape: Torment 2 and Star Wars Eclipse: two highly anticipated sequels left in limbo
summary: It appears that Wizards of the Coast gave the green light to the sequel of the acclaimed RPG but did not fund it, while the ambitious Star Wars project at Quantic Dream may not see the light of day.

title: Supergirl bombs at box office compared to Morbius, Angry Birds 3 reveals trailer, and cult Japanese cinema returns to theaters
summary: The global box office experiences contrasts with Supergirl's flop, the irreverent offering of Angry Birds 3, and the re-release of a Japanese science fiction classic.
